title: The Strawberry Shortcake Movie: Sky's the Limit
original_title: The Strawberry Shortcake Movie: Sky's the Limit
overview: A sudden storm leaves Berry Bitty City with a gigantic problem. Strawberry Shortcake and her friends will have to move their whole tiny town unless they find a way to safely remove a huge boulder that threatens everything they hold dear.
